pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh and verifier.py which hardcode this dataset name.
Verified from export_result.sh and verifier.py which target this file path for evaluation.
Verified from export_result.sh and verifier.py which parse this file for scoring.
Verified from setup_task.sh which writes the ground truth to this path, and verifier.py which reads it.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real US quarterly macroeconomic data (GDP and CPI inflation) spanning 1984:1 to 2009:3 from the Principles of Econometrics (POE5) dataset (usa.gdt). The agent must estimate an ARMA(1,1) model and forecast inflation. The expected output script is verified at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/inflation_forecast.inp, and its execution output is verified at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/inflation_forecast_output.txt. Ground truth coefficients and forecast values are dynamically generated by setup_task.sh and stored in /tmp/reference_values.json for the verifier to check.
